prose.en: Ensure that unencrypted static authenticators are not embedded in applications or other forms of static storage.

guidance.en: In addition to applications, other forms of static storage include access scripts and function keys. Organizations exercise caution when determining whether embedded or stored authenticators are in encrypted or unencrypted form. If authenticators are used in the manner stored, then those representations are considered unencrypted authenticators.

prose.en: unencrypted static authenticators are not embedded in applications or other forms of static storage.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
application code reviews for detecting unencrypted static authenticators
Organizational personnel with authenticator management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing authenticator management capability
